productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Striped Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black, grey and white striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttonless chest placket, seam covering tape on inner back neck, embroidered brand logo on the left chest pocket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Comfortable casual dressing at it's most sophisticated, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and sneakers. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
